items.name: Armbar
items.desc: Control the arm and extend the elbow for the finish.

items.name: Triangle
items.desc: Leg choke using a figure-four around the neck and one arm.

items.name: Kimura
items.desc: Figure-four grip that attacks the shoulder rotation.

items.name: Mount
items.desc: Top control position with hips over opponent’s torso.

items.name: Guard
items.desc: Bottom position using legs to control distance and posture.

items.name: Sweep
items.desc: Reverse positions from bottom to top control.
